cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Evolution with Maverick
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Charlie's attraction to Maverick leads her to break her no-dating-pilots rule, starting a secret romance that deepens into mutual love and ends with a public reunion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Charlie is attracted to Maverick but maintains a professional boundary against dating pilots.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Charlie is publicly reunited with Maverick in a romantic relationship.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Professional Boundary Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Charlie sets a rule against dating pilots, is revealed as a professional TAGREF, but after Maverick's persistence, she agrees to a date and establishes secrecy, compromising her initial stance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Charlie refuses to date pilots to keep work and personal life separate.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Charlie is in a secret relationship with Maverick, breaking her professional rule.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The secrecy of their relationship could create tension with their professional roles.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Ideological Clash and Personal Growth
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Charlie confronts Maverick about his casual attitude towards death and risk, expresses her fear of losing control, and later advises him on humility while demonstrating her own confidence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Charlie is disturbed by Maverick's actions and judges him as insane.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Charlie leaves Maverick with advice on humility, showing emotional maturity and independence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Maverick will internalize Charlie's advice on humility.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Goose as Maverick's RIO: Assignment to Tragedy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Goose is assigned to Top Gun with Maverick, defends their partnership against peers, conflicts over training decisions, and dies in an ejection incident during a flight exercise.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Assigned to Top Gun as Maverick's RIO after challenging Stinger's decision.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Deceased following a fatal ejection from a spinning aircraft.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Maverick's guilt and future as a pilot after Goose's death.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Competence in Aerial Emergencies
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Goose identifies a missile lock during a pursuit and insists on trusting instruments during a disorientation incident, showing his reliability as a RIO.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Under missile lock, confirming the threat and prompting evasive action.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Providing calm guidance during a tense disagreement over aircraft orientation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Cougar remains unconvinced about the plane's orientation despite Goose's reassurance.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Personal Coping and Family Bonds
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Goose uses humor to cope after a crash landing and later joyfully reunites with his wife and son, highlighting his personal life.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Joking with rescue crew after surviving a crash landing.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Affectionately reunited with family at the airport.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Path to Top Gun Instructor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Maverick is assigned to Top Gun, declares his goal to be top graduate, faces discipline issues and setbacks, receives guidance, succeeds in combat, and becomes a Top Gun instructor.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Assigned to Top Gun with acknowledged skill but criticized for recklessness and inability to follow orders.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Appointed as Top Gun instructor, having demonstrated growth and combat success.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Initially, his inability to follow orders and need for discipline; resolved through mentorship and experience.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romance with Charlie
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Maverick first meets Charlie at a bar, establishes a secret romantic relationship with her, and later rekindles it publicly after his achievements.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Initial attraction and pursuit of Charlie at the bar.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Public romantic relationship with Charlie on the flight line.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Secrecy of the relationship on base; resolved by going public.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Trauma and Recovery After Goose's Death
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After a training ambush leads to Goose's fatal ejection injury, Maverick is cleared of fault but struggles with guilt, quits the program, and with Viper's guidance, decides to return.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Overconfidence results in an ambush and Goose's death during ejection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Chooses to return to flying after Viper reveals truth about his father and offers career options.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Guilt and loss of confidence in flying; addressed through Viper's mentorship and decision to return.
